$comment: Two-block STUDIO ingestion manifest (CEO/architect lock 2026-06-23): schema_a_core = scpn-studio-platform federation CapabilityManifest (pending SCPN-STUDIO ratification), architecture_map = this repo's verified superset extension the Hub ignores for federation. Public status vocabulary: wired | library-only | stub | feasibility-only; SOTA/ClaimStatus grades live only in the private audit.

schema_a_core.note: Federation CapabilityManifest (scpn-studio-platform schema A) to be produced by tools/capability_manifest.py once SPO adopts the sibling generator (cf. FUSION/CONTROL/MIF); verb-to-schema-A mapping is under review with the SCPN-STUDIO agent.

architecture_map.role: Domain-agnostic coherence-control core (topology + solver) of the SCPN ecosystem; review-only by default.

lanes.name: binding+oscillators+drivers+imprint
lanes.note: extractor types 'wavelet' and 'zero_crossing' are declared but unimplemented (fall back to Hilbert).

lanes.name: coupling
lanes.note: coupling_est and plasticity are Python-only (Rust unbound).

lanes.name: ssgf
lanes.note: self-stabilising gauge-field closure; opt-in, not in default loop.

lanes.name: autotune
lanes.note: offline binding-spec inference; candidate-safety certificate does not block.

lanes.name: upde
lanes.note: 14-15 engine variants; JAX engines pragma:no cover.

lanes.name: monitor
lanes.note: twin_conformal_gate (CPTC) implemented but not wired into live actuation; modal_participation/phase_koopman/koopman_edmd/oscillation_modes orphaned.

lanes.name: supervisor
lanes.note: pure NumPy; spo-supervisor Rust crate not bound; several lanes offline/review-only; no SMT exporter.

lanes.name: nn
lanes.note: parallel differentiable track; CLI-verification only; 4 blocking validation xfails.

lanes.name: runtime+actuation+assurance+audit
lanes.note: integrity verify + replay are opt-in CLI; signing env-gated; actuation_permitted documentary; deterministic mode default miss_policy=observe; Koopman MPC not in default loop.

lanes.name: adapters+apps
lanes.note: 23 bridges, opt-in, not wired into core CLI/server; only QuantumControlBridge imports a sibling (lazy); HybridCocompiler/FMI aspirational.

lanes.name: studio+reporting+visualization
lanes.note: 13 review panels all execution_disabled; no live studio JSON feed yet (open item).

lanes.name: plugins+scaffold+domainpacks
lanes.note: registry split done; entry-point discovery wired but unpopulated in base; 36 domainpacks.

lanes.name: experimental/accelerators
lanes.note: load-bearing polyglot accelerator layer (misnomer 'experimental'); 168 files; accessed indirectly via dispatchers.

backends.build_vs_runtime: built (libspo_kernel.so) but not importable in every env
optional [nn] extra; parallel, not in default loop
standalone crate, not linked to spo-engine

interfaces.entry: runtime/server.py; 8 routes; optional X-API-Key + rate limit
studio/ ExportManifest (dataclass); no live feed yet

boundaries: Rust kernel builds but is not active in every environment; dispatch falls back to Python.
nn/ differentiable track is parallel, CLI-verification only, with 4 blocking validation xfails.
ssgf/ and autotune/ are opt-in, not in the default loop.
experimental/ is the load-bearing accelerator layer, not research.
wavelet and zero_crossing extractor types are declared but unimplemented (fall back to Hilbert).
Audit chain is real but integrity-verify/replay are opt-in CLI; signing is env-gated.
twin_conformal_gate (CPTC) is implemented but not wired into the live actuation gate.
Formal export covers PRISM and TLA+ only (no SMT-LIB exporter despite docstring).
studio/ has no live JSON feed yet.
